::: {.pub-grid}

::: {.pub-index-col}
<div class="pub-number">2</div>
<a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.4c05313" class="pub-url-link" target="_blank">
article URL <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
</a>
:::

::: {.pub-cite-col}
<span class="pub-title-text">Node Distortions in UiO-66 Inform Negative Thermal Expansion Mechanisms: Kinetic Effects, Frustration, and Lattice Hysteresis</span>

S. M. Vornholt, Z. Chen, <span class="me-underline">J. Hofmann</span>, and K. W. Chapman

*J. Am. Chem. Soc.* **2024**, *146*, 29, 20230–20239, DOI: 10.1021/jacs.4c05313.
:::

::: {.pub-image-col}
![](02_2024_uio/NTEuio_TOC.jpeg)
:::

:::
